attributes.description: Swan Energy Limited (SEL) was originally incorporated in 1909 as Swan Mills Ltd. (SML), a manufacturer and marketer of cotton and polyester textile products in India. Over the years, it diversified into Real estate and is developing a Floating Storage and Regasification Units -based liquid natural gas (LNG) import terminal at Jafrabad in Gujarat.[1][2]

Swan Energy Limited (SEL) was originally incorporated in 1909 as Swan Mills Ltd. (SML), a manufacturer and marketer of cotton and polyester textile products in India. Over the years, it diversified into Real estate and is developing a Floating Storage and Regasification Units -based liquid natural gas (LNG) import terminal at Jafrabad in Gujarat.[1][2]
